title: Dimmable Lamps
description: A small mod that adds lamps that react to the redstone level. Can also be hand dimmed with the wrench! The lamps can dim up to 16 levels.
body:
Dimmable Lamps is a small mod that adds lamps similar to redstone lamps. These lamps output a light level that is consistent with the Redstone level they receive. This is a very niche mod that not many people will use but for some people will be perfect! 

Please give me feedback and certain functions I could add!

Kr,
StraS
